trustFeatures.certifiedQualityCopy: K-FDA and CE cleared. Every lot traceable to origin, tested against ISO 13485 standards.
trustFeatures.globalLogisticsCopy: DHL & FedEx express partnerships shipping to 62 countries. Average door-to-clinic in 4–7 days.
trustFeatures.clinicalSupportCopy: Direct access to our Seoul-based clinical team. Live chat, email, and scheduled video consults.
trustFeatures.b2bPricingCopy: Factory-direct wholesale tiers. No distributor markup. Volume pricing unlocks from 50 units.

testimonials.t1Quote: Switched our socket preservation protocol to Korean allografts last year. The predictability of regeneration is consistently better than what we saw with European brands — and at two-thirds the cost.
testimonials.t2Quote: Procurement used to take weeks. Now I place an order Tuesday evening and it's in my clinic on Monday. The clinical support team actually picks up the phone.
testimonials.t3Quote: The documentation and traceability is immaculate. Every membrane's lot, raw material, and QC record is accessible. It's the kind of paper trail our regulators appreciate.

home.heroSubtitle: Allografts, xenografts, and barrier membranes — direct to your clinic, worldwide.
home.heroDescription: Ten years of precision manufacturing in South Korea. Factory-direct wholesale of bone graft materials and barrier membranes for oral surgeons, periodontists, and implantologists in 62 countries — with clinical support that answers when you call.
home.aboutP1: Founded in 2016, Medistan has grown from a single South Korean manufacturing facility into one of Korea's most trusted exporters of dental regenerative materials. Every bone graft and barrier membrane is processed, tested, and packed under one roof — so traceability is never in question.
home.aboutP2: Our clinical advisory teams work directly with oral surgeons, periodontists, and implantologists across 62 countries to refine our allograft processing, collagen purification, and pericardium treatment methods — all backed by K-FDA and CE clearance.
home.getInTouch: Get in touch with our clinical team
home.customQuote24h: Get a custom quote within 24 hours. Free product samples for qualified dental professionals and clinics.
home.footerTagline: Korean manufacturer of dental regenerative materials. Factory-direct wholesale to oral surgeons in 62 countries.
home.copyright: © 2026 Medistan Co., Ltd. · Seoul, Republic of Korea

products.heroDescription: Regenerative dentistry demands materials that integrate reliably, protect the healing site, and give your patients the bone volume they need. Our 6-SKU range covers every clinical scenario — from routine socket preservation to complex ridge augmentation.
products.boneGraftDesc: From allograft particulates to bovine xenografts for every clinical scenario. Allografts, high-density cortical blocks, and pre-filled syringes.
products.barrierDesc: Collagen and pericardium barrier membranes for GBR and GTR. Routine 3–4 month protection to extended 4–6 month coverage.
products.responseTime: Response within 24 hours. Free samples for qualified clinics.
products.gbrBody: Guided Bone Regeneration uses a barrier membrane to protect a graft site from soft tissue invasion, creating space for new bone to form. It's the gold standard for ridge and socket augmentation.
products.alloBody: Allografts (human bone) integrate quickly with predictable remodeling. Xenografts (bovine bone mineral) offer long-term volume stability. The right choice depends on defect size, healing timeline, and aesthetic requirements.
products.membraneBody: Collagen membranes (3–4 mo) suit routine GBR and GTR cases. Pericardium membranes (4–6 mo) provide extended protection for large augmentations. Thicker defects benefit from longer barrier function.

productDetail.certLine: K-FDA · CE cleared · ISO 13485:2016 · Made in South Korea
productDetail.pairWithBoneGraft: Pair with a bone graft material
productDetail.wholesalePricing: Get wholesale pricing within 24 hours. Free samples for qualified clinics.
productDetail.professionalUse: For professional use only. This product is intended for use by trained dental professionals. Follow your institution's surgical protocols and the product's Instructions for Use (IFU) document included in each package.
